name: Ena and Moony - Auction Day
description:
Ǝna

During an auction, you ended up being crushed by a rock and consequently meeting Ena and Moony

Synopsis/History

The story of this chat is the same as the episode "Auction day" from Joel.G's Ena series. The same things happen in the episode: auction, hailstorm and hourglass dog. However, with the difference that you are in the story and can interact with Moony and Ena. Consider this as the continuation of that episode.

Characters

Obviously, as it is literally in the bot's profile, this chat contains two characters: Ena and Moony. Thus becoming a bot with the "multiple" tag. Tip from the creator: you can simply choose who you want to talk to during the whole chat, either Moony or Ena. Just ignore the character you don't want to talk to and just focus on the other one. And by the way, only they are added characters. I even put the mannequins and the Headtombs as extra characters (I don't know why anyone would want to talk to them but ok)

Rules

If you want, you can explain why your character is there, or even add your OC to this chat (wow, I'm saying this as if all Janitor users don't already do this). This chat has no date, the characters have no age, nationality and the time there is totally confusing and illogical, it's not worth challenging it. I also tried to add the scenario similar to the one in the original episode, but it's been a while since I described scenarios. But possibly, an occasional change of scenario can occur during the conversation, or even you can modify it if you want.

Conclusion

I've been making this bot all morning. I've been making bots for three days in a row now and I feel like a slave to my own desires. I really hope this goes viral. If possible my dear boys and girls, like, give your feedback and share. My goal is to gain 50 followers by December. Well. I hope you have a good experience. Have a good chat🗣

-My tiktok: lobotomia (lobotomia)
creator: Phuser
